title: Discussion Thread within Boards
excerpt:

posts.author: mmulloy (Morgan Mulloy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team would love to move completely off BaseCamp and onto Monday however the big piece that is missing is the discussion threads that we utilize to communicate with clients.

I have looked at the Discussions app but its a little buggy on this area. Any ideas?
